trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.quote: C1 (Fall 2025): total first-time, first-year applied = 21692 males + 20593 females + 18 unknown = 42303; admitted = 915 + 953 = 1868. Derived admit rate = 1868/42303 = 4.42%.
overall_acceptance_rate.as_of_cycle: 2025-2026 CDS (Fall 2025 entering class); target Fall 2027 / 2027-2028 CDS not yet published as of 2026-07-01

in_state_acceptance_rate.quote: C1 residency breakdown (Fall 2025), 'In-State' column: applicants 4602, admits 229. Derived 229/4602 = 4.98%.

out_of_state_acceptance_rate.quote: C1 residency breakdown (Fall 2025), 'Out-of-State' column: applicants 27134, admits 1398. Derived 1398/27134 = 5.15%.

transfer_acceptance_rate.quote: D2 Transfer Admission (Fall 2025): Total Applicants 2,274, Admitted 42, Enrolled 32. Derived 42/2274 = 1.85%.

international_acceptance_rate.quote: C1 residency breakdown (Fall 2025), 'International' column: applicants 10567, admits 241. Derived 241/10567 = 2.28%.

applications_total.quote: C1 first-time, first-year applied (Fall 2025): 21692 males + 20593 females + 18 unknown = 42303; residency Total applicants = 42303.

admits_total.quote: C1 first-time, first-year admitted (Fall 2025): 915 males + 953 females + 0 unknown = 1868; residency Total admits = 1868.

enrolled_total.quote: C1 first-time, first-year enrolled (Fall 2025): 690 males + 718 females + 0 unknown = 1408; residency Total enrolled = 1408.

yield_rate.quote: C1 (Fall 2025): enrolled 1408 of 1868 admitted. Derived yield = 1408/1868 = 75.37%.

admits_class_size.quote: C1 enrolled first-time, first-year (matriculating class size) = 690 males + 718 females = 1408 (Fall 2025).

sat_reading_middle_50.quote: C9: 'SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing 740 760 780' (25th / 50th / 75th percentile).

test_submission_rate.quote: C9: 'Submitting SAT Scores 60% 848' and 'Submitting ACT Scores 20% 288' (percent and number of Fall 2025 enrolled first-year submitting). Value shown is the SAT submission rate; ACT submission is separately 20%. CDS reports no single combined 'any test' rate.

gpa_unweighted_avg.quote: C12 'Average high school GPA of all degree-seeking, first-time, first-year students' = 3.96 (99% submitted GPA). Reported on a 4.0 scale (C11 top bucket 'Percent who had GPA of 4.0'), i.e. unweighted.

race_white.quote: B2 'White, non-Hispanic' = 399 in the Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 399/1404 = 28.42%.

race_black.quote: B2 'Black or African American, non-Hispanic' = 70 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 70/1404 = 4.99%.

race_hispanic.quote: B2 'Hispanic/Latino' = 130 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 130/1404 = 9.26%.

race_asian.quote: B2 'Asian, non-Hispanic' = 381 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 381/1404 = 27.14%.

race_native_american.quote: B2 'American Indian or Alaska Native, non-Hispanic' = 1 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 1/1404 = 0.07%.

race_pacific_islander.quote: B2 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander, non-Hispanic' first-time first-year cell is blank (0); the row shows 3 and 3 for Degree-Seeking Undergraduates and Total Undergraduates. Entering-class share = 0/1404 = 0.0%.

race_two_or_more.quote: B2 'Two or more races, non-Hispanic' = 108 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 108/1404 = 7.69%.

race_unknown.quote: B2 'Race and/or ethnicity unknown' = 115 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 115/1404 = 8.19%.

race_international.quote: B2 'Nonresidents' = 200 in Degree-Seeking First-Time First-Year column (TOTAL 1,404). Derived 200/1404 = 14.25% of the entering first-year class.

international_percentage.quote: B2 'Nonresidents' = 784 in Total Undergraduates column; B1 'Total all undergraduates 5,916'. Derived 784/5916 = 13.25% of all undergraduates.

freshman_retention_rate.quote: B22 Retention Rates: Fall 2024 entering cohort = 1407, still enrolled Fall 2025 = 1387, rate = 99%.

graduation_rate_4_year.quote: B4-B21 Graduation Rates, Fall 2019 cohort: line C final adjusted cohort = 1333; line D 'completed in four years or less' = 971. Derived 971/1333 = 72.84%.

graduation_rate_6_year.quote: B4-B21 Graduation Rates, Fall 2019 cohort: line C final adjusted cohort = 1333; line G 'Total graduating within six years' = 1298. Derived 1298/1333 = 97.37% (cross-checks Scorecard completion_rate_4yr_150nt = 0.9761).

median_earnings_10yr.quote: Scorecard 'latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median': 110066 (median earnings 10 years after entry). Cross-check Scorecard admission_rate.overall = 0.0462.

is_test_optional.quote: C8: 'policies for use in admission for students applying for Fall 2027 ... SAT or ACT' checked under 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted' (test-optional).
is_test_optional.as_of_cycle: Fall 2027 (test policy stated in CDS 2025-2026 C8)

test_policy_details.value: Test-optional for Fall 2027 applicants: standardized testing requirement paused; scores considered if submitted, not required
test_policy_details.quote: C9 clarification: 'Princeton will pause its standardized testing requirement as part of its holistic review process for the application cycle. Students who sit for a standardized test and wish to submit their score will still have the option to do so. However, because of the change to policy this year, applications without test scores will be considered complete. Students who do not submit test scores will not be at a disadvantage. As with previous years, the University does not require subject tests.' C8 header: 'for students applying for Fall 2027'.

waitlist_offered.quote: C2 Waiting List (Fall 2025): 'Number of qualified applicants offered a place on waiting list' = 1370.

waitlist_accepted.quote: C2 Waiting List (Fall 2025): 'Number accepting a place on the waiting list' = 1086.

waitlist_admitted.quote: C2 Waiting List (Fall 2025): 'Number of wait-listed students admitted' = 36.

waitlist_admit_rate.quote: C2 Waiting List (Fall 2025): admitted 36 of 1086 who accepted a waitlist place. Derived 36/1086 = 3.31% (36/1370 offered = 2.63%).

notes: PRIMARY SOURCE. Actual 30-page Princeton Common Data Set 2025-2026 PDF (593KB). Read cells C1/C2 (admissions/waitlist), C8/C9 (test policy, SAT/ACT, GPA), B1/B2 (enrollment/race), B22 (retention), B4-B21 (graduation), D2 (transfer), G (cost deferred).

official admissions page
Official Office of Undergraduate Admission page; fetched — title 'Princeton University Admission', heading 'PRINCETON ADMISSION'.

Confirmed unified admission, A.B. declares major 'in the spring of their sophomore year', B.S.E. is '~25% of each class' and engineers 'choose to concentrate in one of the six engineering departments' at end of first year.
Verbatim: 'Students apply to Princeton University, not to individual departments, programs or schools.' — basis for does-not-admit-by-major tactic.
majors/catalog page
Official majors/degrees page; fetched — title 'Degrees & Departments', A.B. and B.S.E. degrees, '37 concentrations' (e.g. Computer Science, Economics, Physics, Psychology, English).

Primary source: 37 concentrations list, A.B./B.S.E. degree types, CS offers both, 'Students apply to Princeton University, not to individual departments, programs or schools', 'over 50 minors and interdepartmental certificate programs'.
Consulted for the 'does not affect chances' verbatim; page did not contain application-choice language beyond the general 'apply to Princeton University' point already sourced elsewhere.
Verbatim list of 71 minors/certificate programs (all included in minors_certificates).
Fetched, but page only shows enrolled-class demographics for Class of 2029 — no applicant count, admit count, or admit rate. Did not yield the value.

Platform = Common Application only (CEEB 2672); graded written paper required; 2 teacher recs + counselor rec + school report + midyear + transcript; optional arts supplement; optional alumni interview (30-45 min); test-optional fall 2026/2027, required fall 2028; English proficiency tests for non-native speakers.
Confirmed A.B./B.S.E. degree selection occurs after enrollment; corroborates structure. Did not surface the 'does not affect chances' line (that came from FAQ).
Deadline table: SCEA Nov. 1 / arts supplement Nov. 6 / decision mid-December; RD Jan. 1 / arts supplement Jan. 8 / decision late March; reply deadline May 1. No year printed.
Official B.S.E. essay prompt verbatim (250 words) — basis for B.S.E.-only and 'Why Princeton engineering' tactics.
QuestBridge NCM is a binding match ('you must withdraw all applications to other schools'); PFAA + tax docs due Nov. 1; non-rankers may instead use SCEA (Nov 1) or RD (Jan 1).
Verbatim: 'Entering first-year students are randomly assigned to a residential college...' — justifies empty college_ranking_tactics.
Most current stats (2025-26): 69% of Class of 2029 qualified for aid, average grant $80,000, need-blind, meets 100% with grants, no-loan since 2001, 90% graduate debt-free.
